category_title: Socially isolated students with low self-confidence and resilience
scenario_title: Whole class discussion in RMPS curriculum
minimal_context: The class is sitting in a circle for a weekly discussion session about a stimulus text.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are starting our whole class discussion on the stimulus text now. Everyone is in the circle, so please share your questions or ideas.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits next to her older buddy, separated from her classmates. She listens attentively to the others speaking but remains completely silent and does not volunteer any ideas.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Catriona, do you have anything you would like to add to the discussion?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Um... I think... maybe... is it almost time for break?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's focus on the text we just read. What is your idea about the reading?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves closer to her buddy and looks down at her desk) No... I don't have any questions. I'm just going to listen.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are starting our whole class discussion on the stimulus text now. Everyone is in the circle, so please share your questions or ideas.

STUDENT: (Sits next to her older buddy, separated from her classmates. She listens attentively to the others speaking but remains completely silent and does not volunteer any ideas.)

TUTOR: Catriona, do you have anything you would like to add to the discussion?

STUDENT: Um... I think... maybe... is it almost time for break?

TUTOR: Let's focus on the text we just read. What is your idea about the reading?

STUDENT: (Moves closer to her buddy and looks down at her desk) No... I don't have any questions. I'm just going to listen.

task.content: take an active role in team tasks or whole class discussions

context.environment: weekly 1-hour CoPI sessions as part of the Religious, Moral and Philosophical Studies (RMPS) curriculum
context.social_setting: participants in a circle, with regular support from a sixth-year pupil (age 17 years) who acts as a ‘buddy’

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: isolated in class, choosing to sit with her allocated buddy, but not with any of her class mates, and listened attentively to others, but would not volunteer questions or ideas
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: particular difficulties with self-confidence and resilience

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: these would often not be in line with the CoPI structure and sometimes lacked relevance to the discussion
